name: Б.Балбар
quote: Being popular guy is so exhausting!

name: Ч.Ариунболд
quote: University life is like a roller coaster. Except the brakes don't work.

name: П.Батгэрэл
quote: University life is like a roller coaster. Except the brakes don't work.

name: Б.Батмягмар
quote: Submitted at 11:59 PM. Character development.

name: Б.Баярцогт
quote: Stack Overflow got me through more than my lecturers did.

name: Т.Буян-Өлзий
quote: Group projects taught me that I work best alone.

name: Г.Ган-Эрдэнэ
quote: Four years, one coffee machine, infinite deadlines.

name: Э.Ган-Эрдэнэ
quote: It works on my machine. Ship it.

name: Х.Дармаасүрэн
quote: The library was my second home. The canteen was my first.

name: С.Замилан
quote: I learned more from debugging than from lectures. Sorry, professors.

name: Д.Зунхов
quote: Survived thesis season. Barely. But I survived.

name: Б.Ичинхорлоо
quote: If it compiles, it's good enough to present.

name: Б.Лхагвасүрэн
quote: Love Love Love

name: М.Мөнхбат
quote: Four years of 'we'll fix it later.' Later never came.

name: М.Насан-Очир
quote: Internship taught me more in 3 months than university in 4 years. Respectfully.

name: н.Отгон-Эрдэнэ
quote: I didn't procrastinate. I did everything at the last minute *efficiently*.

name: Э.Отгонтуяа
quote: Deadline anxiety is just my love language at this point.

name: Б.Раднаабазар
quote: Sleep. Eat. Code. Repeat. Until graduation.

name: Н.Содбаяр
quote: I became a morning person. Just not by choice.

name: Л.Сэргэлэн
quote: They said university would be the best years of my life. Jury's still out.

name: М.Сугарсүрэн
quote: We didn't just graduate. We survived a masterclass in resilience.

name: Б.Тэмүүлэн
quote: I thought I was learning to code. Turns out I was just learning to Google.

name: Б.Бат-Эрдэнэ
quote: I thought I was learning to code. Turns out I was just learning to Google.
